result.summary: Kiwi.com exposes a partner-facing Tequila HTTP API with publicly visible landing/login pages but no public auth mechanics or machine-readable spec, plus a known MCP server at https://mcp.kiwi.com whose auth requirements are not publicly documented.
result.description: Kiwi.com is a travel-booking company focused on flights and related travel products. It also operates a B2B partner platform called Tequila for selected business partners.

tequila_partner_account.label: Tequila partner account / invitation
tequila_partner_account.setup: Kiwi.com says Tequila is its partner platform where existing partners access API documentation and tools, and that new partnerships are **invitation only**. Start at [Tequila](https://tequila.kiwi.com/) and use the contact path shown there (`affiliates@kiwi.com`) or work through Kiwi.com's partnership process; once invited, sign in to the Tequila portal to access API documentation and any credentials issued for partner integrations. The public docs scraped here do not expose the exact credential format or minting steps.
